title: Doc's Whimscape Additions: Friends & Foes
description: An unofficial Friends & Foes add-on for Whimscape!
body:
![A long image depicting 10 characters in 16x16 pixel art. In order from left to right, theyh are: a short, moss green, very square creature with a silly smile; a firey yellow to red creature with three large shields around it of the same character, wearing a dark red crown; a cow with a white base and dandelion yellow spots with a flower on its head; a pillager with bright orange eyes and a blue cloak with a white trim; a bushy green creature with two white eyes in a black shadow; a small copper-colored robot with a lighting rod on its head; a hunchbacked humanoid with a large pack, wearing a cyan cloak with a yellow piece of fabric on their back; a short, stone-gray humanoid holding a red and yellow block; a blue-robed pillager with bright orange eyes, donning a large, poofy blue hat, and a short, blue and white crab with orange claws, with the right one larger than the left.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a39dc8d31a37559d69d3024a8228e50982be82b.png) **Whimscape - now with more friends and foes!**
I absolutely adore the Whimscape style, but I also play with a handful of mods for quality of life, but they aren't textured the same, so they stick out like a sore thumb! Hence, 'Doc's Whimscape Addons'! Note: I made these for myself, so the textures lean towards my preferences. I'm not the original creator, so they may not match perfectly! Another note: While I was making this, I found an Illusioner texture from the og Whimscape pack in the files. That is the one used here, however, if the creator would prefer me to replace it with one I made, I will do so! [![A horizontally long, light blue button with the words "Download Whimscape" on it, followed by an arrow pointing toa black and purple portal. On the left side of the button is a square icon depicting a large white "W" with a grassy scene behind it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37f9d79f3df9fa56ce348ccaed361b70dc9d365f.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)
